query:
UPDATE follow_ups
SET dataFollowUp = CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 09:00:00')
WHERE leadId = (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE '%Marcio Lira%' LIMIT 1)
  AND status = 'pendente';

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data,
  TIME(f.dataFollowUp) as hora,
  CURDATE() as hoje,
  NOW() as agora,
  CASE 
    WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE() THEN 'HOJE'
    ELSE 'OUTRO DIA'
  END as situacao
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE l.nome LIKE '%Marcio Lira%';
